title: Loosest test first
problem: Grade a score of 95: 90+ is an A, 80+ a B, 70+ a C, anything lower a D.

trace.note: The first test, 95 >= 60, is true — so this branch wins and every later `elif` is skipped.
trace.checkpoint_prompt: score is 95 and the ladder tests `>= 60` first. What grade will it land on?

trace.note: grade = 'D' for a 95. The ladder is ordered loosest-first, so the >= 90 branch is never reached. The first true branch wins.
